name: quietcollective
description: AGPL private gallery, critique, and collaboration Cloudflare app.

scripts.web:bundle: esbuild web/src/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --minify --banner:js="// Generated by npm run web:bundle. Edit web/src/ source modules." --outfile=public/app.js --legal-comments=none
scripts.web:build: npm run web:typecheck && npm run web:bundle && node scripts/check-public.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run web:build && npm run worker:typecheck && npm run test:security && npm run test:permissions
scripts.deploy: npm run verify && npm run d1:migrations:apply:remote && wrangler deploy
